items.title: Peru's president impeached four months into term
items.dek: José Jerí is the third consecutive president to be ousted and the country's seventh since 2016.
items.body: José Jerí is the third consecutive president to be ousted and the country's seventh since 2016.
items.author: IriLine Desk

items.title: Rescuers search for 10 missing skiers after California avalanche
items.dek: Rescuers are racing to the scene, which has seen about 30 inches (76cm) of snowfall in the last 24 hours.
items.body: Rescuers are racing to the scene, which has seen about 30 inches (76cm) of snowfall in the last 24 hours.
items.author: IriLine Desk

items.title: Under pressure from Trump, Venezuela's new president has aces up her sleeve
items.dek: Delcy Rodriguez knows its in America's interests for her to be a success
items.body: Delcy Rodriguez knows its in America's interests for her to be a success
